source.title: Town of Riverhead Town Board Agenda Packet, July 7, 2026 (Fiscal Impact Statements)

method: Each resolution's Town 'Fiscal Impact Statement' answer is shown as-published, alongside a plain-English realistic read. Dollar figures are transcribed from each resolution's RESOLVED clause; where the packet states an amount only in a backup table it is left blank rather than guessed.

largestUnderstatedMarkedNo: Water Capital Project #81851 – USGS Test Wells Closure
